seo.og_title: 1049 Gravot Rd, Iota, LA 70543 — For Sale $175,000
seo.og_description: Farm — None bed / 0 bath / ? sq ft. Offered at $175,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: Seventeen acres of working Louisiana countryside, framed by tree lines and open sky
copy.overview_heading: A Cultivated Landscape in Acadia Parish
overview_paragraphs: Set on 17.35 acres outside Iota, this is a farm in the fullest sense of the word — patterned crop fields laid out in measured rows, fallow ground resting between seasons, and open pasture rolling gently toward a forested perimeter. A gravel drive threads in from the road, past white metal buildings that anchor the property and give it its working rhythm.

The land reads as a composition: irrigated fields with contoured, almost geometric patterns give way to flooded paddies, tree-line dividers, and stands of mature shade trees. At ground level, a broad pasture opens beneath a clear sky, the grass green and the terrain quietly undulating. It is agricultural country doing what it was made to do.

Offered at $175,000, the parcel invites cultivation and stewardship in equal measure — acreage with infrastructure already in place, bordered by the tree lines and open countryside that define this stretch of southwest Louisiana.
copy.pull_quote: Measured rows, open pasture, and a horizon of tree lines — land that keeps its own working rhythm.

feature_groups.title: The Land
items: Irrigated crop fields with contoured row patterns
Flooded paddies and fallow ground in rotation
Open pasture with gently rolling terrain
Tree-lined boundaries and mature shade trees

feature_groups.title: Working Infrastructure
items: On-site power lines serving the property

location_paragraphs: The property sits along Gravot Road just outside Iota, a small community in Acadia Parish in southwest Louisiana. This is agricultural country — a patchwork of cultivated fields, tree lines, and open pasture that stretches toward the distant rural horizon.

The setting is defined by its landscape: contoured irrigated fields, wooded groves, and the flat-to-gently-rolling terrain characteristic of the region. Road access runs directly to the parcel, connecting it to the broader network of country roads that cross the parish.
location_points: Located in Acadia Parish, southwest Louisiana
Rural agricultural setting with cultivated cropland
Direct gravel and paved drive access from the road
Bordered by tree lines and forested perimeter
Surrounded by open pasture and farmland
Open countryside with distant rural views
copy.cta_sub: 1049 Gravot Road is available to tour by appointment. To see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.
